title: Virtual Networks
objective: This course is designed to introduce students to the fundamentals of virtual networks or networking in cloud computing. You will learn about the various components and services offered by cloud providers to facilitate all your networking needs.
description: Virtual networks in the cloud are isolated network environments that allow you to securely connect and manage your cloud resources. They provide a private space within a public cloud infrastructure, enabling you to create subnets, configure routing rules, and control network traffic. Virtual networks are essential for building scalable and secure cloud applications, as they provide a foundation for connecting your resources and ensuring data privacy.

bulletPoints: 1. Press the Play button to listen to the content
2. Press the Stop button to stop the audio
3. Press the Backward arrow button to go to the previous slide
4. Press the Next arrow button to go to the next slide

questions.question: 1) What is the networking component Virtual Machines directly reside in?
3) How can you make a Public Subnet?

answers.ans: a) Add an Internet Gateway to the VPC.
b) Add a Route for destination 0.0.0.0/0 with the Internet Gateway as the target.
c) Set the Subnet as Public.
